title: Snitch Mod
description: JukeAlert snitch management plugin for CivMC
body:
# Snitch Mod

Load `/jalist`, display snitch ranges, help place snitches. Made for the [JukeAlert](https://civwiki.org/wiki/JukeAlert) plugin on [CivMC](https://civmc.net/).

[Join the Discord for announcements, discussion, and support.](https://discord.gg/tNrjyHzDxq)

## Usage

Go through all pages in `/jalist` to load existing snitches.
Once you have the mod installed, snitches from chat alerts and placement are also tracked.

Configure the keybinds, or use the defaults below.

- `O`: Toggle in-game snitch field **o**verlay
- `P`: **P**lacement helper: the field of a snitch placed on any spot on the blue box will be adjacent to the existing snitch at the center of the box
- `N`: Highlight the ideal spot for the **n**ext snitch in the direction you are looking
